
---
name: Documentation improvement
about: Suggest an improvement to the documentation
title: "[Docs] "
labels: documentation
assignees: ""
---

## Documentation Area

Which part of the documentation needs improvement?

Examples:
- README
- Installation guide
- Setup guide
- Deployment guide
- Google Sheets schema
- Apps Script explanation
- Screenshots
- Usage examples

## Problem

Explain what is unclear, missing, outdated, or difficult to understand.

## Suggested Improvement

Describe what should be added, changed, or clarified.

## Additional Context

Add links, screenshots, examples, or notes if needed.
